infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Raksha needs camera access to capture evidence during an SOS emergency.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Raksha needs microphone access to record audio evidence during an SOS emergency.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Raksha uses your location to find safe routes and send it to your guardians during an SOS.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Raksha uses your location to monitor your journey and trigger automatic SOS alerts.

plugins.cameraPermission: Raksha needs camera access to capture evidence during an SOS emergency.
plugins.microphonePermission: Raksha needs microphone access to record audio evidence during an SOS emergency.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Raksha uses your location to find safe routes and alert guardians.
